finding_types.description: Behavior likely differs from intended product behavior.
Old/new API, persisted data, or version skew may break.
Deployment, retry, or scope changes may create unsafe rollout behavior.
Generated or rendered artifacts appear out of sync with source-of-truth changes.
Identity, secret, or RBAC boundaries may have widened unsafely.
Evidence is missing, weak, or contradicted by existing tests/fixtures.
Logs, metrics, tracing, or alert coverage may regress.
The reviewer cannot responsibly conclude without domain-owner confirmation.
